title: Pasting from tables or excel into Monday boards
excerpt: It would be really helpful to be able to cut and paste columns or rows of content into Monday boards.  We often have to consolidate information from various sources and add to a board over time - especially to subitems. …

posts.author: Tiff (Tiffany Brunetti Monroe)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be really helpful to be able to cut and paste columns or rows of content into Monday boards. We often have to consolidate information from various sources and add to a board over time - especially to subitems. While you can paste in the first column of subitems, it would be ideal to paste into all columns.
